description: In early 2022, Citigroup CEO Jane Fraser pushed for a return to the office, resulting in a public clash with the UK government and local financial regulators regarding flexible working expectations post-COVID-19.

key_events.description: Citigroup issues ultimatum for UK staff to return to office.
UK government expresses concern over the lack of flexible working for parents.
Banking industry peers suggest hybrid is the new standard, isolating Citi's stance.
Citigroup softens enforcement due to competitive pressures for talent.

calibration_notes: Shows the tension between traditional finance leadership and modern labor flexibility norms.
